---
name: Bug report
about: Something in the skill, agents, peer.sh, or install flow misbehaves
labels: bug
---

## Environment

- Claude Code version (`claude --version`):
- Install mode: plugin (`claude plugin install …`) / manual (`./install.sh`)
- Main model of the session (orchestrator):
- Codex CLI installed & logged in? (only relevant for peer.sh issues):

## What happened

<!-- What did you ask for, what did the orchestrator/executor actually do?
     For routing/behavior bugs, the dispatch prompt and the executor's
     final message (status line included) are the most useful evidence. -->

## What you expected

<!-- Which rule should have applied? Cite the SKILL.md section or
     dispatch-prompt.md template if you can. -->

## Reproduction

<!-- Smallest prompt/setup that reproduces it. For peer.sh: the exact
     command line and the tail of --out / stderr. -->
